name: To Quick-Roast and Peel Chilies or Peppers
recipeInstructions:
Gas stove method:
1. Lay chilies or peppers on their sides on racks of burners (preferably 1 per burner).
2. Turn flame to high and char chilies or peppers with tongs, turning them occasionally, until skins are blackened (6-8 minutes).
3. Transfer chilies or peppers to a bowl and let stand, covered with plastic wrap, until cool enough to handle.
4. Peel chilies or peppers (wear rubber gloves when handling). Cut off tops and discard seeds and ribs.
Broiler method:
1. Preheat broiler.
2. Quarter chilies or peppers lengthwise, discarding stems, seeds, and ribs (wear rubber gloves when handling).
3. Put skin-side-up chilies or peppers on a rack of a broiler pan about 2 inches from the heat.
4. Broil for 8-12 minutes until skins are blistered and charred.
5. Transfer chilies or peppers to a small bowl and let stand, covered with plastic wrap, until cool enough to handle.
6. Peel chilies or peppers.
